ddls:
CREATE TABLE "insurance_companies" (
  "insurance_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the insurance company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the insurance company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the insurance company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the insurance company */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the insurance company */,
  "license_date" TEXT /* License date of the insurance company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_plans" (
  "insurance_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance plan */,
  "insurance_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance company offering the plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the insurance plan */,
  "premium" REAL /* Premium amount of the insurance plan */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Deductible amount of the insurance plan */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Coverage limit of the insurance plan */,
  "term" INTEGER /* Term of the insurance plan in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_plans_insurance_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("insurance_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* VIN of the vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Registration date of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driving_history" (
  "driving_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driving history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "accidents" INTEGER /* Number of accidents in the user's driving history */,
  "tickets" INTEGER /* Number of tickets in the user's driving history */,
  "claims" INTEGER /* Number of claims in the user's driving history */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of driving experience of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driving_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "insurance_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance company providing the quote */,
  "insurance_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance plan being quoted */,
  "premium" REAL /* Premium amount of the insurance plan */,
  "quote_date" TEXT /* Date the quote was provided */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the quote */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the quote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_insurance_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_plan_id") REFERENCES insurance_plans ("insurance_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_insurance_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("insurance_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the payment */,
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g. credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_quote_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_id") REFERENCES quotes ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment being invoiced */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g. paid, pending) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receipts" (
  "receipt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receipt */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment being receipted */,
  "receipt_date" TEXT /* Date the receipt was generated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the receipt */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g. credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the claim */,
  "insurance_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance company handling the claim */,
  "insurance_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance plan being claimed */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g. accident, theft) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_insurance_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("insurance_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_insurance_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_plan_id") REFERENCES insurance_plans ("insurance_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_documents" (
  "claim_document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim document */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being supported */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g. police report, medical bill) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_documents_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_statuses" (
  "claim_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim status update */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g. pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_statuses_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the role */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role being assigned (e.g. admin, user) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role being assigned the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission being assigned (e.g. view quotes, manage claims) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being changed */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g. insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_payments" (
  "claim_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim payment */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g. check, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_payments_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_rejections" (
  "claim_rejection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim rejection */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being rejected */,
  "rejection_date" TEXT /* Date the rejection was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rejection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_rejection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_rejections_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)
